catalyst: Deadline for PUC and ERCOT to submit an implementation proposal on the directive that data centers fully fund their own grid infrastructure costs.
consequence: The cost-allocation mechanism adopted will directly affect underwriting for every DFW data-center land deal in diligence [51].

catalyst: Q2 2026 DFW industrial market reports from CBRE, JLL, Cushman & Wakefield, Newmark, and Colliers are expected to publish.
consequence: These will be the first hard read on whether Q1's record leasing volume translated into a vacancy decline, and will reset the comp set this brief has been citing from Q1 data.

catalyst: Prologis deadline to announce a firm Segro bid or walk away.
consequence: A completed deal could accelerate logistics-portfolio consolidation appetite reaching DFW sellers [48][49][50].

catalyst: FOMC meeting, the second under Chair Warsh.
consequence: Any shift from the June 17 hold directly reprices DFW industrial cap rates and refinance proceeds [38][39].

catalyst: Fort Worth Council vote on the $4.5M Mach Industries incentive package.
consequence: Approval would fill 310,036 SF at Alliance Gateway 34 and set a fresh incentive-per-job comp [19][20][21].
